prompts.name: start_session
prompts.description: Git session start: checkout main, pull --rebase origin main, verify working tree. The standard way to begin any git workflow.

prompts.name: finish_session
prompts.description: Git session finish: add, commit, rebase onto main, push. The standard way to end and publish a git session.

prompts.name: sync
prompts.description: Git sync: fetch origin and rebase onto origin/main.
